name: wmkf_policy-activeversion-relationship
_comment: Adds the wmkf_ActiveVersion lookup from wmkf_policy → wmkf_policyversion AFTER both entities exist. Splitting it out resolves the chicken-and-egg dependency where wmkf_policy needs to lookup wmkf_policyversion (which doesn't exist yet) and wmkf_policyversion needs to lookup wmkf_policy (which is its parent).

relationships.lookupDescription: The currently-active wmkf_policyversion child. Staff sets this to atomically activate a draft. Reading this lookup is the only authoritative way to find the in-force policy text for a slot — never read 'newest by effective date'.
